title: Sheep in the Box
synopsis: Two years after losing their son Kakeru, Otone and her husband Kensuke take into their lives a humanoid from a company that rents humanoids to bereaved families as replacements for lost loved ones. The robot looks and behaves exactly like Kakeru, with Otone embracing its arrival as Kensuke struggles to accept it. Living with “him” seems to restore the flow of time within the family, yet gradually exposes the unspoken wounds and lingering regrets each parent carries after the loss. All the while, he begins to slip away to meet other humanoid children, unnoticed by the parents.

synopsis_lang.en: Two years after losing their son Kakeru, Otone and her husband Kensuke take into their lives a humanoid from a company that rents humanoids to bereaved families as replacements for lost loved ones. The robot looks and behaves exactly like Kakeru, with Otone embracing its arrival as Kensuke struggles to accept it. Living with “him” seems to restore the flow of time within the family, yet gradually exposes the unspoken wounds and lingering regrets each parent carries after the loss. All the while, he begins to slip away to meet other humanoid children, unnoticed by the parents.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 《小偷家族》康城金棕櫚大獎得主、日本人氣大導演是枝裕和自編自導話題新作，繼《怪物》後第十度入圍康城影展並再次角逐最高榮譽金棕櫚獎，亦是繼《海街女孩日記》後相隔十年再與女星綾瀨遙合作，帶來一個探討科技倫理與親情矛盾的家族故事：在近未來的日本社會裡，中小型建築公司總裁甲本健介（大悟 飾）與同為建築師的妻子甲本音音（綾瀨遙 飾）在兒子喪生後，竟不惜代價借助AI復活技術重建家庭，家中迎來了外貌與聲音跟兒子一模一樣的人形仿生機械人，更一起重啟生活日常，但一個意外事故牽引著每一位家庭成員直面心底隱藏的情感，走向他們意想不到的療癒之旅。

cast_lang.zh_hk: 綾瀨遙、大悟（千鳥）、桒木里夢

subtitle: Chinese,English
